productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys White Shirt
description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves with buttoned flaps on the cuffs, buttoned placket on the front, two patch pockets on the front with buttoned flaps, brand name embroidered on the left pocket, printed branding on the upper back and curved hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours and mild detergent Wash/dry inside out Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decoration Remove all detachable accessories before washing Get your little one ready for a trip out in this shirt from Gini and Jony. The patch pockets on the front and the brand detailing adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
